interpretation: Current c=2 remains generated-token equal under rocprof in this rerun and uses projection_dispatch.selected_candidate=batch.
Unprofiled c=2 remains faster than serial bridge but slower than c=1, so no retained c=2 performance claim is made.

The largest traced aggregate kernel bucket is qwen35_paged_full_attn_decode_context_tensor_batch_kernel; the trace includes whole-process validation kernels, so top-kernel shares are diagnostic rather than a retained decode-only profile.
